{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603230516361BCAE83BA7A9BEA986E4"}"},"total":580},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7576855400388231960","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"脑洞挺大没有那种为收后宫而遇到女性角色看了这么多就这本书是把绿茶校花按地上打成猪头的主角随性率真看着特别放松真是难得的佳作[赞][赞][赞][赞][赞][赞][赞][赞][赞][爱心][爱心][爱心][爱心][爱心][爱心][爱心][爱心][爱心][送心][送心][送心][送心][送心][送心][送心][送心][送心]好评好评超级好评"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1764127268,"group_id":"7565468433148546073","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NyKnmWL5cDsnmGb2uEBtTVVL6ABwCMuQf8mkte2mlyd1","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776788850&x-signature=sYCOa%2F9ZxoTl7Yne0kWtutXwoT0%3D","user_id":"2903130259599024","user_name":"爱吃清汤苋菜的王珊"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2903130259599024","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7565468433148546073","book_info":{"abstract":"【御兽＋愉悦系统＋微抽象＋轻松（沙雕）向＋对战】
（新书评分低，以后也不一定会涨）
因勇救落水哈基米被淹死的洛尘，穿越到了灵气复苏的御兽世界。
意外激活御兽愉悦系统！
只需让御兽开心，便可获得各种逆天奖励！
但没想到的是，初始御兽竟是反骨仔！
【答应绿茶校花请求，补偿其大量现金，可提升您的御兽月泮猫愉悦值！】
洛尘反手将其开除！
有系统，沃特玛愉悦谁不是愉悦？
于是……
【宿主给史莱姆喂半瓶‘牢大’，愉悦值提升，奖励起死回骸药剂！】
【宿主为落水银翼蝠吹干毛发，愉悦值提升，奖励灵气3倍速修炼！】
【宿主帮尔多龙掏干净耳朵，愉悦值提升，奖励技能真龙之怒！】
……
就这样……
靠着不断愉悦御兽。
洛尘的实力，以众人看不懂的速度狂飙！
众星因你，皆降为尘！
以‘洛神’之名，洛尘登顶御兽至高王座！
有人问，作为顶级御兽师，洛神您的御兽秘诀究竟是什么？
洛尘淡然一笑：“哪有什么诀窍？我只是……稍微比你们会哄御兽开心一点。”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/78abd4fe90885b213d90c04b483debe6","author":"上山挥犁噫","author_id":"","book_id":"7565468433148546073","book_name":"成为御兽王者第一步：丢掉舔猫","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#181010","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"4.5万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":1014,"name":"都市高武","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1014&name=都市高武&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":74,"name":"宠物","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=74&name=宠物&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":516,"name":"都市异能","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=516&name=都市异能&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":778,"name":"搞笑轻松","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=778&name=搞笑轻松&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7565468808207401497","read_count":"44516","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"642866"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.0","serial_count":"301","tags":"都市高武,都市,系统,宠物,都市异能,搞笑轻松","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/f1fd204f4e5ae63811675503ff2f610d~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779398196&x-signature=qWh710TFdrw64noh4FXweEQ5DsE%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2727206378287784","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"145"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603230516361BCAE83BA7A9BEA986E4"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读不足30分钟后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":14
